text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While passing behind the school building in the
evening, I spot an awfully subdued Marvelous
Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hm? What brings you here, Marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I came to see the flowers in bloom, but they've all
withered.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: And they were so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ahh, I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But do you know what perennial plants are,
Marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Um... Nope, never heard of that! Tell me about
them, Ardan! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even after their flowers are scattered to the wind,
and their leaves and stems have withered...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The roots of perennial plants live on in the soil.
And the following year, their flowers bloom again.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Wooow! That's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. So I'm sure that this time next year, there
will be many beautiful flowers in bloom right here.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You learn something new every day! Perennial
plants are so very, very marvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Marvelous. Yes, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I lock eyes with Marvelous Sunday, who's back to
her sprightly self.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. ☆ Aren't perennial plants marvelous? ★
choice_data_list:
Why do perennial plants wither in the first
place?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I appreciate the kind words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I did some research into the topic after growing
curious as to why they bloom again after having
withered.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The way they continue to bloom is truly splendid.
It's as if they've a strong will that keeps them
from giving up.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It really seems that way! ☆ They're incredibly
marvelous! ★ I hope I can be like a perennial
plant too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How wonderful. I, too, hope to follow their
example.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Right! ☆ Let's become marvelous together! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: That's a good question! Why do they wither?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
In the same manner that some animals hibernate,
these plants rest in the earth during seasons
unsuitable for their growth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they're storing up their energy while they
wait for the moment they can shine most
brilliantly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
They live to the fullest in the limited time they
have in this world. I, too, wish to live that way.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Me too, me too! ☆ Let's become marvelous
together! ★

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's both do our best.
